ogTitle: Upper Tenthill vs Upper Wheatvale: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Tenthill vs Upper Wheatvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Tenthill, Queensland and Upper Wheatvale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Tenthill has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Upper Wheatvale (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Tenthill or Upper Wheatvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Tenthill has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Upper Wheatvale scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Tenthill scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Wheatvale scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Tenthill or Upper Wheatvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Tenthill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
